NAVAREA XIX 6/26
 NORWEGIAN SEA BARENTS SEA
 ANDOEYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS FROM 2005 TO 2020 UTC 19 JAN TO 25 JAN
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA

 DANGER AREA UP RANGE   CLOSED FROM 2005 TO 2045 UTC
 A.68-59.34N 015-28.05E
 B.69-13.37N 015-58.53E
 C.70-53.83N 014-10.91E
 D.70-41.63N 012-51.95E

 DANGER AREA DOWN RANGE  CLOSED FROM 2005 TO 2150 UTC
 A.71-03.42N 015-12.97E
 B.74-15.84N 009-52.26E
 C.76-50.36N 003-23.82E
 D.79-11.76N 006-04.26W
 E.79-55.85N 010-21.89W
 F.79-41.46N 011-34.90W
 G.78-03.48N 004-13.39W
 H.76-01.02N 002-00.04E
 I.73-32.12N 007-12.24E
 J.70-30.12N 011-37.50E
 K.71-03.42N 015-12.97E

 FOR COORDINATION, ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON. 
 TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 73 60 70 64 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16 CALLSIGN ANDOEYA SPACE. 
 E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO.
 WWW.KARTVERKET.NO/EN/AT-SEA/EFS AND WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO FOR DAILY 
 UPDATES AND MAPS.
 REF NOTICES TO MARINERS 01/2026
